case_title: MATTHEW HAMMON VS. GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY HAMMON, MATTHEW GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY 25, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMMON, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC. $1,269.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,359.00, DAMAGES INCURRED BY PLAINTIFF FOR MONTHLY INCREASE IN RENT STEMMING FROM DEFENDANT'S INACCURATE REPRESENTATIONS; NO AWARD FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,519.00 FILED BY HAMMON, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMMON, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMMON, MATTHEW
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GS 1401 MISSION PROJECT OWNERS, LLC.
